rationale: The cited paper is used directly in the methods section as the source for the trust manipulation in Study 1, with the authors explicitly stating they adapt the high/low trust scenario from Srivastava and Chakravarti (2009). This is more than background citation because it informs how a core construct is operationalized in the experiment. Although the citing paper does not build its main theory on the cited work, it meaningfully reuses its experimental idea in a new context.
relation_description: The citing paper applies the cited paper's trust-manipulation approach to design its own experiment on horizontal referrals. Specifically, it adapts wording and logic from Srivastava and Chakravarti (2009) to operationalize mutual trust between supplier and customer.
